reasoning: Koren, today we're targeting your lactate clearance limiter by leveraging over-unders in a real-world setting. In your last lunch ride, your average power was well below what's needed for the long, sustained climbs like those on the Alpine Loop. This workout will simulate the challenge you'll face in races by pushing your aerobic and anaerobic systems to improve fatigue resistance and develop that underdeveloped aerobic base.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 3 sets of 12 minutes: 2 minutes at 242W followed by 4 minutes at 201W, repeated over the duration.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
